title: How to quickly subtitle your video? Use Arctime!
content:
Intro

These days, due to the some school club activities, I need to subtitle lots of videos. After finishing this work, I am going to share some awesome ways to subtitile the video. This tutorial will definitely help you save your time if you will or need to subtitile some videos!


Arctime

Using Premier to subtitle videos is really a waste of time. Today, I am going to tell you how to use the specialized software Arctime. ArcTime is a awesome subtitle creation software, which can run on Mac, Windows and Linux. You can quickly create and edit timelines, and you can also efficiently edit and translate text.

How to Download

Go to the link http://arctime.cn/download-arctime.html.

If you are in China, just download via 主下载线路 (main download line). If not, just download via 备选线路2（全球) (alternative line 2(Global)). And remember to download the version that matches your computer(Mac, Windows or Linux).

How to Use

  1. Double click “Arctime Pro.exe”;
  2. Import audio or video files: File->Import Audio or Video Files;
  3. If you already have the subtitle files, just import relative files via File->Import SRT Subtitles or File->Import ASS Subtitles;
  4. If you don’t have subtitle files, you need to create a textfile. This textfile needs to contain subtitles and and each line is one subtitle. Therefore, the format should be the as shown in the following figure.
  5. Click the Quick Drag Icon;
  6. Then you can subtitle the video in this way, and one time you will subtitle one line in the textfile that you have imported in step 4;

 

  1. Change your subtitile styles:
    Click the button shown below. What color is the subtitle box and that is its corresponding group.


Then you can change the style of any group here.


Sometimes, you can preview the subtitle only if you save it.（File->Save)

8. Export the subtitled videos: Export->Quick Video Compression(MP4) or Export->Quick Video Compression(H.265);

More functions

Also, Arctime provide other functions like Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR), automatic translation and so on. Some features are available for a fee.
You can also visit http://arctime.cn to learn more. (This web is in Chinese)

title: Blue Screen 404 Page
content:
Intro

The website hosting server will typically generate a “404 Not Found” web page when a user attempts to follow a broken or dead link; hence a good 404 page is important for a blog. Here I’m going to share a Microsoft Blue Screen style 404 page.

(Effect Picture)

Source Code

Here is H5 source code.

You can click here to visist this 404 page.

How to put 404 page on Your Web

  1. Create 404.html in your web root directory and define the content as you like;(Now you can visist 404 page at yourdomain/404.html, but you cannot visist 404 page while you access to a dead or nonexistent link.)
  2. Follow your service provider rules to set 404 page.

title: Basic MarkDown Grammar
content:
Intro

Since most posts of my blog are wriiten by Markdown, I will take down some basic Markdown grammar. Hope this can help you learn more about Markdown.


What is Markdown

Markdown is a lightweight markup language for creating formatted text using a plain-text editor. John Gruber and Aaron Swartz created Markdown in 2004 as a markup language that is appealing to the human users in its source form. Markdown is widely used in blogging, instant messaging, online forums, collaboration software, documentation pages, and even readme files.

---Wikipedia

Grammar

Heading

Bold

Italic

Blockquote

Code

``` javascript
var canvas = document.getElementById(“canvas”);
var context = canvas.getContext(“2d”);
```

i.e. Markdown will render this code with ‘javascript’ grammar.
effect:

Link

effect:
Home

Horizontal Line

effect:

Import Picture

Import Audio

Import video


What's more, Markdown supports HTML5 grammar. This means you can use <br> and other grammars in HTML5.

title: Use Python for Data Analysis-Numpy
content:
Intro

NumPy(Numerical Python) is a library for the Python programming language, adding support for large, multi-dimensional arrays and matrices, along with a large collection of high-level mathematical functions to operate on these arrays. In this article, I will briefly introduce how to use numpy.

Reminder: ALl the codes are run in Jupter

Why NumPy is so efficient?

  1. Internally stores data in contiguous block of memory, so easy to retrieve.
    Has alogrithm library written in C that can operate on this memory without any type-checking or overhead.
    NumPy arrays also use much less memory than other built-in Python sequences.
  2. NumPy operations perform Complex Computations without need for Python loops.

For example, you can find numpy is faster and uses less memory than just python from the following code.

Multiple 2 for each data structure

ndarry

It is a container for homogenous data, all its elements must be of same type.

Create ndarray

1.array - Will create an array out of a list. For list of lists, will create a higher-dimensional array.

Here, dtype=np.float64 is actually default, you can choose int32 or data types

2.empty - Creates array without initializing values. May return uninitialized garbage values.

may return garbage values, may not just 0

3.zeros - Creates array initialized with zeroes.

4.arange - Create array initialized with range of values.

Change dtype

astype will create a new ndarry

Operations and functions

The operations shown below are on each entries if the shapes of the array are the same.

+, -, *, /, comparison

sqrt and exp

max or min between two array

mean, sum

mean and sum can be also used to caclulation in columns or rows.

cumsum, cumprod

Notice on slicing

The change on slicing will also influence the original array.

This happens because numpy is used for data analysis, create a new array will be a waste of memory.
If you wanna a copy, please use arr_slice = arr[5:8].copy.

Save and load

Save in binary format and save as .npy

Save multiple array, which will save as .npz

And load it like ‘dictionary’

If need data to be compressed, use numpy.savez_compressed：

Linear Algebra

dot is on entries

x.dot(y) is same as np.dot(x, y)：

Matrix Multiplication

Use @ for matrix multiplication（the same asPython 3.5).

Transpose

Use x.T or np.T(x) to get the transpose of matrix x.

linalg

There are some other functions in numpy.linalg that you can use for Linear Algebra.
For example, we can use inv to find the inverse of a matrix.

I have briefly introduce numpy in python, but this article doesn’t cover everything. You can visist w3school-numpy for more information, hope this article can help you!

title: Start Guide of HTML and Vue
content:
Intro

This blog article is for those who want to have an overview of web construction(mainly about HTML, CSS, Javascript and Vue.js). At the end of article, I also provide a small project for you to practice.

Overview

HTML: the basic structure of sites, which is enhanced and modified by other technologies like CSS and JavaScript.
CSS: is used to control presentation, formatting, and layout.
JavaScript: is used to control the behavior of different elements.
Vue.js: a progressive framework for building user interfaces.

To be honest, learning them is not a difficult thing, but you have to spend some time. Don’t be impatient, you need to make it step by step.
So how do we learn them?
We can learn them by:

  1. viewing official documentation (while viewing you can write some codes to practice) and then;
  2. doing some small projects to practice.

HTML

The basic formmat of HTML is like this:

Learn HTML here(English) or here(Chinese)

Small Project: todolist

title: Wechat Jump Jump Bot
content:
Intro

When people talk about WeChat Mini Games, the game Tiao Yi Tiao, translated as Jump Jump, will be certainly mentioned. It used to be really popular in China few years ago. Today, I am going to use python to write an automatic jump bot for this game on Wechat PC.

About the game

In the Jump Jump, you are going to control the black, chess-like piece (a pawn, much like you will soon become), simply press your finger down on the screen and let go to hop. The longer you press down, the further and higher you’ll hop from one object to another; one successful hop without falling on the ground will get you one point, if you land in the middle of the platform you’ll get two points instead of one, and if you hop on a special box (colorful or with special symbols) and wait a while, you’ll receive an extra 2-30 points.

And for this bot, it used to reach more than 10,000 points, and it failed because I stopped the game! Because I thought it was high enough!!! (Already World No.1 I guess)


Basic Principle

The challenge in this game is that people don’t know the exact pressing time and thay cannot press exactly. But computer can make it.

We use Wechat PC and open Jump Jump, we will find it will shows in a certain location on your computer.
What we should do is: get the screenshot of this area -> find the piece and destination location in pixels -> get the pressing time -> press by computer.

Here, we use pyautogui to get the scrennshot and control the mouse.

Then, the problem is how to calculate the pressing time? We can find that we only need to calculate the axis x diffrence between piece and destination, then we can estimate the pressing time by the difference multiplied by a certain coefficient. (Yes, we only need x location!)

So, how to get the x location of piece and destination? we can find the piece and boards are symmetric. We can scan from up to down, and once we find a certain color, we keep it x location in an array, then we get the mean of the array. The mean should be the x location of the piece or board center(destination).

Source Code

More Jump Bots

And there are many people making this kind of automatic jump bots and my idea is also from them, there are kinds of Jump Bots on Github!

Finally, hope you can enjoy this game and enjoy coding! I believe the most important thing here is not “cheating” but using programming skills to do something cool.
